chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-2417 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-10586/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on MA-10587/19 4. For hearing of main case. 28.10.2019. Mr. Faisal Nadeem Abro, advocate for petitioner. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for declaration to the effect that he is Pakistani national. By seeking such declaration the petitioner has also sought for direction against NADRA to issue him CNIC with further direction against the police personals that they may not arrest him as Afghan National. The controversy involved being factual in nature could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed without notice to other side leaving the petitioner to exhaust the remedy for redressal of his grievance before another forum in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
